# Shopinvader Restapi Invoice

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:6ba5174b92362e183b139ac682acba8ebdd839ea3b6cd7e21908e5c3aef43f11
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }}

This addon adds services to access a customer's open and paid invoices (only related to Sale orders/Cart).
These services can be useful if you want to give your customers access to their invoice history.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/shopinvader/odoo-shopinvader/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/shopinvader/odoo-shopinvader/issues/new?body=module:%20shopinvader_restapi_invoice%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

## Credits

### Maintainers

This module is part of the [shopinvader/odoo-shopinvader](https://github.com/shopinvader/odoo-shopinvader/tree/16.0/shopinvader_restapi_invoice) project on GitHub.

You are welcome to contribute.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_restapi_invoice.tests.test_invoice_service.TestInvoiceServiceAnonymous.test_get_invoice_anonymous
documentation:
Test the get on guest mode (using anonymous user).
It should not return any result, even if the anonymous user has some
invoices
:return:

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_restapi_invoice.tests.test_invoice_service.TestInvoiceServiceAnonymous._make_payment
documentation:
Make payment for given invoice
\:param invoice: account.move recordset
\:param amount: float
\:return: bool

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_restapi_invoice.tests.test_invoice_service.TestInvoiceService.test_get_invoice_logged
documentation:
Test the get on a logged user.
In the first part, the user should have any invoice.
But to the second, he should have one.
:return:

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_restapi_invoice.tests.test_invoice_service.TestInvoiceService.test_get_invoice_no_number
documentation:
Test the get on an invoice without payment_reference ("number" into json result)
:return:

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_restapi_invoice.tests.test_invoice_service.TestInvoiceService.test_get_invoice_no_date_due
documentation:
Test the get on an invoice without date_due ("date_due" into json result)
:return:

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_restapi_invoice.tests.test_invoice_service.TestInvoiceService.test_get_multi_invoice
documentation:
Test the get on a logged user.
Check the search with many invoices
:return:

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_restapi_invoice.tests.test_invoice_service.TestInvoiceService.test_invoice_get
documentation:
Test the invoice/get on a logged user.
Create many invoices to ensure the result will be the one of given id.
:return:

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_restapi_invoice.tests.test_invoice_service.TestInvoiceService.test_invoice_get_not_owner
documentation:
Test the invoice/get on a logged user.
For this case, the logged user is not the owner of these invoices.
So we should have an exception.
:return:

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_restapi_invoice.tests.common.CommonInvoiceCase._confirm_and_invoice_sale
documentation:
Confirm the given SO and create an invoice.
Can also make the payment if payment parameter is True
\:param sale: sale.order recordset
\:param validate: bool
\:param payment: bool
\:return: account.move

documentation:

\:return: bool

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_restapi_invoice.tests.common.CommonInvoiceCase._create_invoice
documentation:
Create a new invoice
\:param partner: res.partner
\:param inv_type: str
\:param validate: bool
\:return: stock.invoice recordset

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_restapi_invoice.tests.common.CommonInvoiceCase._get_selection_label
documentation:
Get the translated label of the invoice selection field
\:param invoice: account.move recordset
\:param field: str
\:return: str
Common for invoice service
